evidence.test_command: python -m pytest tests/runtime/test_contract_bootstrap.py tests/runtime/test_run_start_artifacts.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_replay.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_protocol_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_policy_enforcement.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_replay_isolation.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_compatibility.py tests/application/test_turn_artifact_writer.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_codes.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_code_adoption.py tests/runtime/test_prompt_budget_policy.py tests/application/test_prompt_budget_guard.py tests/application/test_turn_executor_context.py tests/application/test_turn_executor_runtime_context_bridge.py tests/application/test_turn_executor_replay.py tests/application/test_turn_executor_skill_contract.py tests/application/test_turn_executor_middleware.py -q && python -m pytest tests/application/test_orchestrator_epic.py -k "build_turn_context_protocol_governed_defaults or build_turn_context_protocol_governed_env_overrides or build_turn_context_uses_active_run_policy_overrides or build_turn_context_protocol_determinism_invalid_network_mode_fails_fast" -q

implemented_now: canonical prompt budget policy source added at core/policies/prompt_budget.yaml with stage-level limits
runtime prompt budget policy loader validates schema, stage coverage, and deterministic stage selection
turn execution enforces fail-closed prompt budget validation before model inference and emits E_PROMPT_BUDGET_EXCEEDED on violations
token accounting integrates backend tokenizer counters via model/provider count_tokens paths and emits E_TOKENIZER_ACCOUNTING when strict backend binding is required
turn artifacts now emit prompt_budget_usage.json and prompt_structure.json, plus prompt_diff.txt on prompt-structure drift across adjacent turns
artifact schema registry now includes prompt budget and prompt structure artifact schema entries
